name: Affin Duo Visa & Mastercard Credit Cards
description:
The Affin Duo Visa Credit Card is ideal for Malaysians who regularly use E-Wallets, and loves online shopping.

The Affin Duo Mastercard Credit Card is ideal for Malaysians who prefer collecting rewards points instead of cashback, and mostly spend on Dining, Groceries, and Petrol.
highlights: [Visa Only] 3% Cashback for Online Shopping, E-Wallet Reloads, & Auto Billing
[Visa Only] Cashback capped at RM30 per month if spending is below RM3000
[Visa Only] Cashback capped at RM50 per month if spending is RM3000 or above
[Mastercard Only] 3X AFFIN Rewards Points on Dining, Groceries & Petrol
[Visa & Mastercard] Make 12 transactions per year to waive annual fees
